user_comment: This feed lets you know whenever a new note is published on this site. Copy the following URL -- https://ckunte.net/feed.json -- and add it to your feed reader.
title: C Kunte: weeknotes

items.title: The end (of weeknotes)
items.content_html:
I am stepping away from this. Perhaps for a while, perhaps for good; at this point I do not know.

Writing about my week was something I enjoyed. I am broken inside; sad and empty. To continue expressing would be like being in denial. And I want to give myself the time to find that joy, if ever, again.

Until then, adiós.
